acceptance_criteria: All process artifact contracts exist in schemas/contracts/v1.
Rust process artifact mirrors round-trip through serde and appear in the embedded schema registry.

open_questions.question: Contract field sets stay additive and aligned with the validator.

objective: Design the process contracts and helper types.
design_summary: Keep JSON contracts flat and explicit.
Reuse helper structs for traceability and profile evidence inside the Rust mirrors.
public_interface_changes: Add eight process contracts to schemas/contracts/v1.
Expose process artifact structs in the contracts crate.
boundary_impacts: Contract tests must cover serde round trips.
